page.html_page_title: Check your bin collections - Croydon Council

response_body.data:
Missed bin or crew related select issue address

Check your collection dates

Find out when your rubbish and recycling are collected, download your collection calendar and report any issues.

Site notice

Table sorted by:

created in host

Related content

  • What goes in your rubbish and recycling bins
  • Sign up to garden waste collections
  • Order a bulky waste collection
  • Find your local recycling centre
  • Clinical waste collections
  • Help with putting your bins out (assisted collections)
  • Request a new bin or recycling box
  • Cleaner Croydon

Batteries and textiles

We can collect batteries and textiles with any other regular recycling collection. Leave these items in a plastic bag on top of your recycling bin or box.
Sometimes the batteries/textiles compartment on the bin truck gets full and we are unable to collect them. If so, please take to your local recycling centre or leave out with your next recycling collection.
HRRC
Local recycling centres Record 356866969

My bin was not returned correctly

We regularly remind our crews that all bins must be returned to the right place.
If the crew have not returned your bin to the correct location, or have accidentally spilled some rubbish, you can report this within 2 working days through the 'Report a problem with this bin or collection' link.
